introSection: Speedway Coaster (formerly called Daytona Draft and Speedway Draft) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Nascar Speedpark in Sevierville, Tennessee, USA. The ride opened in 2004.
fullText: Speedway Coaster (formerly called Daytona Draft and Speedway Draft) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Nascar Speedpark in Sevierville, Tennessee, USA. The ride opened in 2004.
